{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Sales Executive",
  "description": "At SIM, we are team of professionals and technical specialists from wide ranging backgrounds. We combine the capacity for promoting businesses, delivering services and building organizations as wellas strengthening their systems and have sustained our reputation for improving organizational cultures And business outcomes. Our charter is to focus on evolving innovative solutions for change at affordable costs.

Soft Intelligent Machines (SIM) helps each client determine an achievable course of action that aligns with its current and future business priorities. By effectively managing portfolios of ICT issues for optimum results, our clients gain a unique source of competitive advantage and the ability to thrive in a dynamic business environment.

We help our clients to focus on doing the right things that result in immediate business impact. We provide a range of customized solutions that ranges from: Business applications , core infrastructure , systems and storages, datacenters, Security solutions, enterprise wide communication and networking. Our in-depth industry knowledge and technical expertise, flexible delivery models help customers harness the best out of their IT investments by creating a reliable and scalable infrastructure.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Executive

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Soft Intelligent Machines is seeking a motivated and enthusiastic Entry-Level Sales Executive to join our innovative team.
	This role is ideal for recent graduates or early-career professionals who are passionate about technology, sales, and building client relationships.
	The successful candidate will support the sales process by identifying business opportunities, engaging prospective clients, and promoting our technology solutions to drive business growth.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and develop new business opportunities within the IT industry.
	Work closely with the technical and support teams to prepare proposals, quotations, and client presentations.
	Participate in product demonstrations, client meetings, and sales presentations.
	Learn and effectively communicate the value of our technology solutions to prospective clients.
	Maintain accurate records of client interactions and follow up to ensure customer satisfaction and relationship growth.
	Stay up to date with the company&#39;s products, industry trends, and competitor offerings.


Qualifications


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Computer Science, Marketing, Business Administration, or a related field.
	0&ndash;2 years of experience in sales, marketing, customer service, or a related field.
	Previous IT sales experience is an added advantage.
	Strong interest in technology and sales.
	Excellent communication, interpersonal, and presentation skills.
	Ability to build and maintain client relationships.
	Target-driven, self-motivated, and eager to learn.
	Basic knowledge of IT solutions is an added advantage.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: info@softintelligentmachines.com using &quot;Sales Executive&quot; as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.",

Sales Executive Job at SIM Nigeria




        
    

        
        At SIM, we are team of professionals and technical specialists from wide ranging backgrounds. We combine the capacity for promoting businesses, delivering services and building organizations as wellas strengthening their systems and have sustained our reputation for improving organizational cultures And business outcomes. Our charter is to focus on evolving innovative solutions for change at affordable costs.

Soft Intelligent Machines (SIM) helps each client determine an achievable course of action that aligns with its current and future business priorities. By effectively managing portfolios of ICT issues for optimum results, our clients gain a unique source of competitive advantage and the ability to thrive in a dynamic business environment.
     

            
    



We help our clients to focus on doing the right things that result in immediate business impact. We provide a range of customized solutions that ranges from: Business applications , core infrastructure , systems and storages, datacenters, Security solutions, enterprise wide communication and networking. Our in-depth industry knowledge and technical expertise, flexible delivery models help customers harness the best out of their IT investments by creating a reliable and scalable infrastructure.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Executive

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Soft Intelligent Machines is seeking a motivated and enthusiastic Entry-Level Sales Executive to join our innovative team.
	This role is ideal for recent graduates or early-career professionals who are passionate about technology, sales, and building client relationships.
	The successful candidate will support the sales process by identifying business opportunities, engaging prospective clients, and promoting our technology solutions to drive business growth.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and develop new business opportunities within the IT industry.
	Work closely with the technical and support teams to prepare proposals, quotations, and client presentations.
	Participate in product demonstrations, client meetings, and sales presentations.
	Learn and effectively communicate the value of our technology solutions to prospective clients.
	Maintain accurate records of client interactions and follow up to ensure customer satisfaction and relationship growth.
	Stay up to date with the company's products, industry trends, and competitor offerings.


Qualifications


	Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Marketing, Business Administration, or a related field.
	0–2 years of experience in sales, marketing, customer service, or a related field.
	Previous IT sales experience is an added advantage.
	Strong interest in technology and sales.
	Excellent communication, interpersonal, and presentation skills.
	Ability to build and maintain client relationships.
	Target-driven, self-motivated, and eager to learn.
	Basic knowledge of IT solutions is an added advantage.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Sales Executive" as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Aphro Beauty is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operations Lead
Job Location: Abuja / Lagos (Hybrid)

Role Brief


	The moving parts coordinator - Responsible for daily, weekly, and monthly activities at Aphro Beauty; restocks, supplies procurement, coordinating inventory movement between fulfilment centres, maintaining accurate delivery and procurement records, resolving complaints, and ensuring that all relevant internal teams are communicated to with


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a relevant qualification.


This Role is for if:


	You&#39;re able to take authority as the backbone of Aphro Beauty&#39;s retail operations
	You&#39;re highly efficient at multitasking, proactive in thought &amp; action
	You&#39;re diplomatic, comfortable interacting with multiple vendors daily &amp; great at crisis resolution
	Efficiency &amp; coordination drives your decision making process
	You have experience in a similar role &amp; skilled with data software.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and summary of why you&#39;re a great fit for the role to: info@theaphrobeauty.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Operations Lead Job at Aphro Beauty




        
    

        
        Aphro Beauty is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operations Lead
Job Location: Abuja / Lagos (Hybrid)

Role Brief


	The moving parts coordinator - Responsible for daily, weekly, and monthly activities at Aphro Beauty; restocks, supplies procurement, coordinating inventory movement between fulfilment centres, maintaining accurate delivery and procurement records, resolving complaints, and ensuring that all relevant internal teams are communicated to with


Requirements
     

            
    




	Candidates should possess a relevant qualification.


This Role is for if:


	You're able to take authority as the backbone of Aphro Beauty's retail operations
	You're highly efficient at multitasking, proactive in thought & action
	You're diplomatic, comfortable interacting with multiple vendors daily & great at crisis resolution
	Efficiency & coordination drives your decision making process
	You have experience in a similar role & skilled with data software.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and summary of why you're a great fit for the role to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media Manager",
  "description": "Wahala No Dey Finish - Come Chop is a food content brand that focuses on creating engaging video content and high-quality visuals. We are recruiting to fill the position below:

	Actively foster an engaged and positive online community, encouraging discussions and user-generated content.

Social Media Manager Job at Wahala No Dey Finish




        
    

        
        Wahala No Dey Finish - Come Chop is a food content brand that focuses on creating engaging video content and high-quality visuals. They are active on platforms like YouTube and Facebook, showcasing food-related challenges and culinary showdowns, aiming to build an active and positive online community around their unique brand identity in the food content industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager

Job Location: Lagos

Job Description
Platform Management and Community Engagement:
     

            
    




	Actively foster an engaged and positive online community, encouraging discussions and user-generated content.
	Monitor social media channels for trends, feedback, and opportunities for engagement.
	Content Strategy and Calendar Planning
	Performance Analysis and Reporting.


Qualifications and Skills


	Experience as a Social Media Manager or similar role, with a strong track record of managing and growing social media platforms.
	Passion for food content and a desire to contribute to a growing brand.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and portfolio to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Application Engineer",
  "description": "Mantrac is the sole distributor for Caterpillar products in Nigeria, distributing and supporting machinery, power systems and material-handling equipment. The company provides customers with comprehensive solutions, backed by technical know-how, experience and in-depth knowledge of their local markets.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Application Engineer

Job Location: Lagos
Job Type: Full Time

Summary OF Responsibilities


	Responsible for the development, promotion, and implementation of the technical aspects of Power Systems business.


Main Function


	Engage in negotiating Power Systems product sales into high valued projects by highlighting Power Systems technical capabilities.
	Provide when/where necessary, professional technical inputs to assist in achieving Power Systems sales target.
	Project Power Systems as a centre of excellence, adding values to the business and benefit to the customer.
	Disseminate technical advice to all categories of Power Systems customer from assessing present load, forecasting expansion, genset site survey, sizing the best genset to meet load demand, designing an appropriate power distribution system, deliver final purchase, installation and commissioning.
	Prepare and submit technical quotation for Power Systems product and their installation requirement.
	Supervise installations of Power Systems products in order that they meet up to international standards and specifications.
	Intimate potential customers of Caterpillar&rsquo;s range of Power Systems products, highlighting Power Systems product sales as a complete product support package.
	Provide technical inputs to support the Regional Sales force in their bid to win Power Systems product sales.
	Liaise with the Field Service representatives to initiate Contract Service Maintenance agreements and to execute them when contract has been signed.
	Attend to related duties as may be required by the Manager.


CoNTACTS:


	Managing Directors, Chief Engineers, Technical Directors and Project Managers of major accounts in Nigeria.
	Technical Management teams of Oil and associated companies e.g TEXACO, Mobil etc.
	Design Engineers and Consultants.
	All levels of MNL


Requirements


	B.Sc / B.ENG or HND in Electronics and Electrical Engineering with at least three (3) years of relevant experience.


Environment:


	Financial Impact:
	See annual work plan
	Hazards:
	Risk of accidents due to extensive travelling by road and air.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: recruitment@mantracnigeria.com using the Job Position as subject of email.",

Application Engineer Job at Mantrac




        
    

        
        Mantrac is the sole distributor for Caterpillar products in Nigeria, distributing and supporting machinery, power systems and material-handling equipment. The company provides customers with comprehensive solutions, backed by technical know-how, experience and in-depth knowledge of their local markets.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Application Engineer

Job Location: Lagos
Job Type: Full Time

Summary OF Responsibilities


	Responsible for the development, promotion, and implementation of the technical aspects of Power Systems business.


Main Function
     

            
    




	Engage in negotiating Power Systems product sales into high valued projects by highlighting Power Systems technical capabilities.
	Provide when/where necessary, professional technical inputs to assist in achieving Power Systems sales target.
	Project Power Systems as a centre of excellence, adding values to the business and benefit to the customer.
	Disseminate technical advice to all categories of Power Systems customer from assessing present load, forecasting expansion, genset site survey, sizing the best genset to meet load demand, designing an appropriate power distribution system, deliver final purchase, installation and commissioning.
	Prepare and submit technical quotation for Power Systems product and their installation requirement.
	Supervise installations of Power Systems products in order that they meet up to international standards and specifications.
	Intimate potential customers of Caterpillar’s range of Power Systems products, highlighting Power Systems product sales as a complete product support package.
	Provide technical inputs to support the Regional Sales force in their bid to win Power Systems product sales.
	Liaise with the Field Service representatives to initiate Contract Service Maintenance agreements and to execute them when contract has been signed.
	Attend to related duties as may be required by the Manager.


CoNTACTS:


	Managing Directors, Chief Engineers, Technical Directors and Project Managers of major accounts in Nigeria.
	Technical Management teams of Oil and associated companies e.g TEXACO, Mobil etc.
	Design Engineers and Consultants.
	All levels of MNL


Requirements


	B.Sc / B.ENG or HND in Electronics and Electrical Engineering with at least three (3) years of relevant experience.


Environment:


	Financial Impact:
	See annual work plan
	Hazards:
	Risk of accidents due to extensive travelling by road and air.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as subject of email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "HRIS Analyst",
  "description": "Nestoil is Nigeria&rsquo;s largest indigenous Engineering, Procurement, Construction and Commissioning (EPCC) Company in the Oil and Gas sector and has been a significant contributor to local content in the industry since inception about 30 years ago. With about 2,000 direct employees, Nestoil continues to redefine industry standards in Pipeline Construction, Repairs and Maintenance with associated facilities for Dredging, River Crossing and Shoreline Protection.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:&nbsp;

Job Position: HRIS Analyst

Job Location: Lagos

Description


	We are seeking a detail-oriented and analytical HRIS Analyst to support the effective management, optimization, and reporting of our Human Resources Information System.
	The role will serve as a key link between HR, IT, payroll, finance, operations, and business leaders, ensuring accurate employee data, reliable HR reporting, efficient system workflows, and compliance with internal controls and data privacy requirements.


Responsibilities
As a HRIS analyst you will be responsible for:


	Maintain, configure, and support the HRIS platform and related HR technology modules, including employee records, recruitment, onboarding, payroll interfaces, time and attendance, benefits, performance, learning, and reporting.
	Ensure high standards of data accuracy, integrity, confidentiality, and security across all HR systems through routine audits, data validation, and issue resolution.
	Develop and deliver HR reports, dashboards, and workforce analytics to support decision-making on headcount, manpower planning, turnover, payroll, training, compliance, and employee lifecycle metrics.
	Act as the first point of technical support for HRIS users, resolving system issues, responding to user inquiries, and escalating complex matters to IT, vendors, or system administrators where required.
	Partner with HR, IT, payroll, finance, and operations teams to gather requirements, improve workflows, automate manual processes, and align HR system functionality with business needs.
	Support HRIS projects, upgrades, integrations, testing, and rollouts, including user acceptance testing, change documentation, training materials, and post-implementation support.
	Manage HR data uploads, employee master data changes, organizational structure updates, job codes, position data, approval workflows, and system access requests.
	Monitor system integrations with payroll, finance, access control, learning, recruitment, and other enterprise platforms to ensure timely and accurate data flow.
	Support statutory, regulatory, internal audit, and management reporting requirements relevant to the oil and gas sector, including workforce compliance, contractor data, training records, and manpower reporting.
	Train HR team members and end users on HRIS processes, reporting tools, self-service features, and data management standards.


Key Performance Indicators


	Accuracy and completeness of employee master data and HRIS records.
	Timeliness and quality of HR reports, dashboards, and management information.
	Resolution time for HRIS support requests and system issues.
	Successful completion of HRIS upgrades, testing, integrations, and process improvement projects.
	Compliance with data privacy, access control, internal audit, and HR governance standards.
	User adoption and satisfaction with HRIS tools, workflows, and self-service processes.


Requirements
What are we looking for?


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Human Resources, Information Systems, Computer Science, Business Administration, Industrial Relations, Statistics, or a related field.
	3&ndash;5 years of relevant experience in HRIS administration, HR operations, HR analytics, payroll systems support, or business systems analysis.
	Hands-on experience or strong working knowledge of SAP SuccessFactors is required, particularly modules such as Employee Central, Recruitment, Onboarding, Performance &amp; Goals, Learning, Compensation, Reporting, and Role-Based Permissions.
	Strong understanding of HR processes, employee data management, payroll interfaces, reporting cycles, and HR service delivery.
	Experience supporting system configuration, data audits, user access management, testing, reporting, and process improvement initiatives.
	Professional certification in HR, HR analytics, project management, data analytics, or HR technology is desirable.


Technical Skills:


	Strong proficiency in Microsoft Excel
	Working knowledge of HR dashboards and reporting tools such as Power BI, Tableau, Excel Power Query, or native HRIS reporting modules.
	Ability to support SAP SuccessFactors administration tasks, including user access, workflow configuration, data imports, reporting, system testing, issue troubleshooting, and coordination with implementation partners or vendors.
	Basic to intermediate knowledge of SQL, database concepts, or system integration principles is an advantage.
	Ability to document business requirements, process flows, test scripts, user guides, and standard operating procedures.
	Understanding of data privacy, access control, audit trails, and secure handling of sensitive employee information.
",

  "validThrough": "2026-08-09",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Nestoil Nigeria"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",

       "streetAddress": ". ",

    }
  },

    "name": "",
    "value": "201582"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",

HRIS Analyst Job at Nestoil Nigeria




        
    

        
        Nestoil is Nigeria’s largest indigenous Engineering, Procurement, Construction and Commissioning (EPCC) Company in the Oil and Gas sector and has been a significant contributor to local content in the industry since inception about 30 years ago. With about 2,000 direct employees, Nestoil continues to redefine industry standards in Pipeline Construction, Repairs and Maintenance with associated facilities for Dredging, River Crossing and Shoreline Protection.

We are recruiting to fill the position below: 

Job Position: HRIS Analyst

Job Location: Lagos

Description
     

            
    




	We are seeking a detail-oriented and analytical HRIS Analyst to support the effective management, optimization, and reporting of our Human Resources Information System.
	The role will serve as a key link between HR, IT, payroll, finance, operations, and business leaders, ensuring accurate employee data, reliable HR reporting, efficient system workflows, and compliance with internal controls and data privacy requirements.


Responsibilities
As a HRIS analyst you will be responsible for:


	Maintain, configure, and support the HRIS platform and related HR technology modules, including employee records, recruitment, onboarding, payroll interfaces, time and attendance, benefits, performance, learning, and reporting.
	Ensure high standards of data accuracy, integrity, confidentiality, and security across all HR systems through routine audits, data validation, and issue resolution.
	Develop and deliver HR reports, dashboards, and workforce analytics to support decision-making on headcount, manpower planning, turnover, payroll, training, compliance, and employee lifecycle metrics.
	Act as the first point of technical support for HRIS users, resolving system issues, responding to user inquiries, and escalating complex matters to IT, vendors, or system administrators where required.
	Partner with HR, IT, payroll, finance, and operations teams to gather requirements, improve workflows, automate manual processes, and align HR system functionality with business needs.
	Support HRIS projects, upgrades, integrations, testing, and rollouts, including user acceptance testing, change documentation, training materials, and post-implementation support.
	Manage HR data uploads, employee master data changes, organizational structure updates, job codes, position data, approval workflows, and system access requests.
	Monitor system integrations with payroll, finance, access control, learning, recruitment, and other enterprise platforms to ensure timely and accurate data flow.
	Support statutory, regulatory, internal audit, and management reporting requirements relevant to the oil and gas sector, including workforce compliance, contractor data, training records, and manpower reporting.
	Train HR team members and end users on HRIS processes, reporting tools, self-service features, and data management standards.


Key Performance Indicators


	Accuracy and completeness of employee master data and HRIS records.
	Timeliness and quality of HR reports, dashboards, and management information.
	Resolution time for HRIS support requests and system issues.
	Successful completion of HRIS upgrades, testing, integrations, and process improvement projects.
	Compliance with data privacy, access control, internal audit, and HR governance standards.
	User adoption and satisfaction with HRIS tools, workflows, and self-service processes.


Requirements
What are we looking for?


	Bachelor’s Degree in Human Resources, Information Systems, Computer Science, Business Administration, Industrial Relations, Statistics, or a related field.
	3–5 years of relevant experience in HRIS administration, HR operations, HR analytics, payroll systems support, or business systems analysis.
	Hands-on experience or strong working knowledge of SAP SuccessFactors is required, particularly modules such as Employee Central, Recruitment, Onboarding, Performance & Goals, Learning, Compensation, Reporting, and Role-Based Permissions.
	Strong understanding of HR processes, employee data management, payroll interfaces, reporting cycles, and HR service delivery.
	Experience supporting system configuration, data audits, user access management, testing, reporting, and process improvement initiatives.
	Professional certification in HR, HR analytics, project management, data analytics, or HR technology is desirable.


Technical Skills:


	Strong proficiency in Microsoft Excel
	Working knowledge of HR dashboards and reporting tools such as Power BI, Tableau, Excel Power Query, or native HRIS reporting modules.
	Ability to support SAP SuccessFactors administration tasks, including user access, workflow configuration, data imports, reporting, system testing, issue troubleshooting, and coordination with implementation partners or vendors.
	Basic to intermediate knowledge of SQL, database concepts, or system integration principles is an advantage.
	Ability to document business requirements, process flows, test scripts, user guides, and standard operating procedures.
	Understanding of data privacy, access control, audit trails, and secure handling of sensitive employee information.
